name: The Platinum Card® from American Express

welcome_offer.description: You may be eligible for as high as 175,000 Membership Rewards® points after spending $12,000 in eligible purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership. Welcome offers vary and you may not be eligible.

earning_rates.notes: Per $1 on flights booked directly with airlines or through Amex Travel (on up to $500,000 per calendar year)
Per $1 on hotels booked through Amex Travel
Per $1 on prepaid hotels and rental cars booked through Amex Travel

annual_credits.name: Airline Fee Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $200 in statement credits per calendar year for incidental fees on a selected qualifying airline

annual_credits.name: Uber Cash
annual_credits.description: Up to $200 in Uber Cash each year for U.S. rides and Uber Eats orders. Enrollment required.

annual_credits.name: Saks Fifth Avenue
annual_credits.description: Up to $100 statement credit per calendar year at Saks Fifth Avenue (up to $50 Jan-June, up to $50 July-Dec). Enrollment required.

annual_credits.name: Equinox
annual_credits.description: Up to $300 in statement credits annually for Equinox gym memberships. Enrollment required.

annual_credits.name: Streaming & Digital Entertainment
annual_credits.description: Up to $240 in statement credits annually ($20 per month) for select streaming and digital entertainment subscriptions. Enrollment required.

annual_credits.name: Walmart+
annual_credits.description: Up to $155 in statement credits annually for Walmart+ membership (subject to usage). Enrollment required.

annual_credits.name: Fine Hotels + Resorts (FHR) Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $300 credit per calendar year for prepaid Fine Hotels + Resorts® or The Hotel Collection bookings with a minimum 2-night stay through Amex Travel.

annual_credits.name: Clear Plus
annual_credits.description: Up to $209 in statement credits per calendar year for CLEAR+ membership. Enrollment required.

lounge_access.other: Centurion Lounges, Priority Pass Select, Delta Sky Club (when flying Delta), Escape Lounges, Airspace Lounges

other_benefits: Fine Hotels + Resorts (FHR) access with breakfast credits and late checkout
The Hotel Collection (THC) with $75 credit and room upgrade
